title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Industrial Disputes Act, 1947. 1[(2) It extends to the whole of India: 2* * * * * (3) It shall come into force on the first day of April, 1947.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 36 of 1956, s. 2, for the sub-section (2) (w.e.f. 29-8-1956). 2. Omitted by Act 51 of 1970, s. 2 and the Schedule (w.e.f. 1-9-1971).
